title: Discourse Markers in Advanced Speech
description: Subtle markers that organize spoken and written arguments: nevertheless, furthermore, admittedly, by and large.
summary_pt_br: Marcadores discursivos: adicionar, contrastar, conceder, resumir. Nevertheless, furthermore, admittedly.

scenes.subtitle_en: Subtle markers that organize spoken and written arguments: nevertheless, furthermore, admittedly, by and large.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Marcadores discursivos: adicionar, contrastar, conceder, resumir. Nevertheless, furthermore, admittedly.

scenes.text_en: Subtle markers that organize spoken and written arguments: nevertheless, furthermore, admittedly, by and large. Today's focus: discourse markers in advanced speech. The plan has flaws; nevertheless, it is the best option.
scenes.text_pt: Marcadores discursivos: adicionar, contrastar, conceder, resumir. Nevertheless, furthermore, admittedly. Foco de hoje: discourse markers in advanced speech. O plano tem falhas; mesmo assim, é a melhor opção.

scenes.title: Discourse Markers in Advanced Speech
scenes.body_en: Types: adding (furthermore, moreover), contrasting (nevertheless, on the contrary), conceding (admittedly, granted), summarizing (overall, by and large).
scenes.body_pt: Marcadores discursivos: adicionar, contrastar, conceder, resumir. Nevertheless, furthermore, admittedly.

examples.en: The plan has flaws; nevertheless, it is the best option.
examples.pt: O plano tem falhas; mesmo assim, é a melhor opção.

examples.en: Admittedly, I was skeptical at first.
examples.pt: Confesso que no começo fui cético.

examples.en: By and large, the experiment was a success.
examples.pt: De modo geral, o experimento foi um sucesso.

scenes.title: Key vocabulary — Discourse Markers in Advanced Speech

exercise.question: Complete: "The plan has flaws; ___, it is the best option."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "The plan has flaws; nevertheless, it is the best option."
exercise.hint_pt_br: O plano tem falhas; mesmo assim, é a melhor opção.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Admittedly, I was skeptical at first.
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "Admittedly, I was skeptical at first."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Confesso que no começo fui cético.

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Discourse Markers in Advanced Speech — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre discourse markers in advanced speech. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Add a concession to this claim: 'Remote work improves output.'

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Nevertheless, async tools fill the gap.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Overall, remote work wins more than it loses.

scenes.title: The essay rewrite
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Rewrite a short paragraph using at least three discourse markers.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Zara gathered five students around a table with their drafts and one bright red pen between them.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: Admittedly, your argument is sharp — but the connective tissue between ideas is weak.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: So words like nevertheless and furthermore are what readers rely on to follow my logic?

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: Furthermore, they signal whether the next sentence agrees or disagrees with the previous one.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: By and large, I had never noticed how much markers guided the way I read essays.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: A single marker, used well, does the work of an entire paragraph of clumsy repetition.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Discourse Markers in Advanced Speech". Subtle markers that organize spoken and written arguments: nevertheless, furthermore, admittedly, by and large. The plan has flaws; nevertheless, it is the best option. Admittedly, I was skeptical at first. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Discourse Markers in Advanced Speech". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year
check.explanation: She says: "Discourse Markers in Advanced Speech".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Discourse Markers in Advanced Speech".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.
